title: Inside the data centres powering AI: gold racks, demented noise, and 40 diesel generators
excerpt: AI can seem like magic, a voice from a phone, an answer from nowhere. Step inside the buildings that make it, and the magic evaporates. What is left is noise, heat, metal, and an enormous appetite for power. Axios’s Amy Harder toured a test server hall run by Digital Realty in Ashburn, Virginia, the heart […]
content_html:
AI can seem like magic, a voice from a phone, an answer from nowhere. Step inside the buildings that make it, and the magic evaporates. What is left is noise, heat, metal, and an enormous appetite for power.

Axios’s Amy Harder toured a test server hall run by Digital Realty in Ashburn, Virginia, the heart of America’s “data center alley.”

The first thing she noticed was the sound, which she called “demented white noise.” It comes from fans fighting the heat of racks of AI chips. A glass floor showed the cooling pipes running beneath her feet.

At the bottom of one closet-sized rack sat a gold-coloured Nvidia system. The colour is deliberate, if fake. “Gold is associated with high value and performance,” an Nvidia spokesperson said.

The value is real enough. “That’s about $1 million right there,” a Digital Realty engineer said of the rack.

Built to be boring

The 💜 of EU tech

The latest rumblings from the EU tech scene, a story from our wise ol' founder Boris, and some questionable AI art. It's free, every week, in your inbox. Sign up now!

For all the money, a data centre is dull by design. “If excitement is happening inside a data center, something has probably gone wrong,” Harder wrote. From outside, the buildings are windowless warehouses.

The drama is in the power and the cooling: substations, water towers, or long rows of industrial air conditioners.

The scale shows in the details.

Harder counted almost 40 diesel generators bolted to one building, for backup only, the company said. Virginia’s grid, which normally feeds the site, runs largely on gas and nuclear. The nearby Digital Dulles campus could eventually hold 13 data centres, a bet worth more than $10bn.

Cooling here will lean on energy rather than water, so no giant towers.

Why the doors stay shut

Getting in is the hard part. Some operators refused a tour outright. Others demanded non-disclosure agreements, and server halls are usually off-limits. That secrecy, Harder argued, is part of what feeds the backlash now spreading through communities worried about power bills and water.

She left convinced firms could show the public far more without giving away secrets.

The buildout is only accelerating. Digital Realty is scouting innovation labs in Singapore, São Paulo, and Johannesburg. AI’s physical footprint is growing fast, and mostly out of sight.

The less people see of it, the more they seem to distrust it, which may be the industry’s real design flaw.

sentences.en: Digital Realty is scouting innovation labs in Singapore, São Paulo, and Johannesburg.
sentences.zh: Digital Realty 正在新加坡、圣保罗和约翰内斯堡物色创新实验室。

sentences.en: AI’s physical footprint is growing fast, and mostly out of sight.
sentences.zh: 人工智能的物理足迹正在快速增长，而且大部分都在人们的视线之外。

blocks.html_en: The less people see of it, the more they seem to distrust it, which may be the industry’s real design flaw.

sentences.en: The less people see of it, the more they seem to distrust it, which may be the industry’s real design flaw.
sentences.zh: 人们越少看到它，他们似乎就越不信任它，这可能是该行业真正的设计缺陷。

content_html_zh:
人工智能看起来就像魔法，是来自手机的声音，是不知从何而来的答案。 走进建造它的建筑，魔法就会消失。 剩下的就是噪音、热量、金属和对电力的巨大需求。

Axios 的 Amy Harder 参观了 Digital Realty 位于弗吉尼亚州阿什本（美国“数据中心巷”的中心）运营的测试服务器大厅。

她注意到的第一件事就是声音，她称之为“疯狂的白噪音”。 它来自于与人工智能芯片机架的热量作斗争的粉丝。 玻璃地板显示出她脚下运行的冷却管道。

在一个壁橱大小的机架底部放置着一套金色的 Nvidia 系统。 颜色是故意的，如果是假的。 “黄金与高价值和性能相关，”英伟达发言人表示。

价值足够真实。 “这大约是 100 万美元，”一位 Digital Realty 工程师谈到这个机架时说道。

为无聊而生

欧盟科技的💜

来自欧盟科技界的最新传言、我们明智的创始人鲍里斯的故事，以及一些值得怀疑的人工智能艺术。 每周都会免费发送到您的收件箱中。 立即注册！

尽管花费了很多钱，数据中心的设计却很乏味。 哈德写道：“如果数据中心内部发生了令人兴奋的事情，那么很可能出现了问题。” 从外面看，这些建筑物是没有窗户的仓库。

戏剧性的地方在于电力和冷却：变电站、水塔或一长排工业空调。

规模体现在细节中。

该公司表示，哈德数了一下，一栋建筑上安装了近 40 台柴油发电机，仅供备用。 弗吉尼亚州的电网通常为该地区供电，主要依靠天然气和核能。 附近的杜勒斯数字园区最终可能拥有 13 个数据中心，赌注价值超过 100 亿美元。

这里的冷却将依靠能源而不是水，所以没有巨型塔。

为什么门一直关着

进入是困难的部分。 一些经营者直接拒绝了旅行。 其他人则要求保密协议，而服务器大厅通常是禁区。 哈德认为，这种保密是助长目前在担心电费和水费的社区中蔓延的强烈抵制的部分原因。

她离开时坚信，公司可以在不泄露秘密的情况下向公众展示更多内容。

建设只会加速。 Digital Realty 正在新加坡、圣保罗和约翰内斯堡物色创新实验室。 人工智能的物理足迹正在快速增长，而且大部分都在人们的视线之外。

人们越少看到它，他们似乎就越不信任它，这可能是该行业真正的设计缺陷。
